## Branch 1: `feat/integrations-own-category`

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Author | iamnaii <akenarin.ak@gmail.com> |
| Last commit | 2026-06-24 13:48 +0700 |
| Commits ahead of main | 1 |
| Files changed | 9 (web-only: App.tsx, settings-registry.tsx, menu.ts + 6 test files, CLAUDE.md) |

### Summary
Splits the "การเชื่อมต่อ" items (IntegrationHubPage, MdmTestPage) out of the `system` settings category into a new standalone `integrations` category. Old paths redirect to new locations.

**Path changes:**
- `/settings/system/integrations` → `/settings/integrations/hub` (redirect added)
- `/settings/system/mdm` → `/settings/integrations/mdm` (redirect added)
- `/settings/integrations` (bare) → now resolves to `CategoryPage('integrations')` (no redirect needed)

**Role changes:**
- `system` category roles: `['OWNER', 'ACCOUNTANT']` → `['OWNER']` (all remaining system items are OWNER-only)
- `integrations` category: ACCOUNTANT can see `hub` item; `mdm` item is OWNER-only

### Security Check
- No new controllers
- No new guards or role changes on backend
- No financial calculations
- No raw `fetch()` calls
- No hardcoded secrets

### Issues Found
None.

### Recommendation: ✅ APPROVE

## Branch 3: `chore/local-config-sync`

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Author | iamnaii <akenarin.ak@gmail.com> |
| Last commit | 2026-06-24 16:47 +0700 |
| Commits ahead of main | 1 |
| Files changed | 2 (.vscode/settings.json, package-lock.json) |

### Summary
Two changes:
1. Adds `"prisma.pinToPrisma6": true` to `.vscode/settings.json` — prevents Prisma VSCode extension from auto-upgrading to v7 before the project is ready.
2. Removes `"peer": true` from ~25 platform-specific npm packages in `package-lock.json` — lockfile drift cleanup.

### Security Check
- No source code changes
- Lockfile change removes `peer` flag from binary packages (cosmetic, no version changes)
- VSCode setting is developer tooling only

### Issues Found
None.

### Recommendation: ✅ APPROVE
